Immobilize  

Description

2: Root

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 80 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 1.75 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Deletable: Yes
Dot Stacking: Yes Reflectable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Short Buff Box: No
Target Type: Single Spell Type: Detrimental
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your feet adhere to the ground.
Cast on other: Soandso adheres to the ground.
Effect Fades: Your feet come free.

Game Description

Causes the earth to adhere to your target's feet, preventing them from moving for up to 1 min.

Items with this effect

  • Defender of the Ancestral Spirit
  • Fabled Ring of Immobilization
  • Glob of Gooey Goo
  • Moonshimmer Earring
  • Ragepaw Howler Earring
  • Ring of Immobilization
  • Spell: Immobilize [Bought/Dropped]
  • Spell: Immobilize [Enchanter]
  • Spell: Immobilize [Wizard]

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Immobilize
Spell: Immobilize
Spell: Immobilize
ClassLevel
SHM51
ENC39
NEC58
WIZ39
CLR46
Expansion:

Duration:
1 min

Ak'Anon
Erudin

Player made vs Vendor
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2007 at 10:27 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591933146407
Sage
52 posts
Confirm this. Enchanter made is Enchanter only. Wizard made is Wizard only.

Frequently in bazaar for cheap, but does not help Clerics, Shaman etc.
▲ Page top
Player made vs Vendor
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2007 at 12:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591911194446
48 posts
With spells for classes that do not research any of the 4 research classes can make them. So although it is for Shaman or Cleric it can be made by necro, wiz, chanter, or mage. The only time it is restricted to research by class is when it is for that int class.
▲ Page top
Enc only
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2006 at 9:43 PM Rating: Decent
dafdaf

Scholar
1,273 posts

Is there a version that my shaman can use, or has this spell been changed to enchanter-only?

▲ Page top
Completely Useless for a Necromancer
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2004 at 8:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263090286
8 posts
If you compare this seplls stats to Instill youre paying 20 more mana for a spell that lasts 2/3 as long. immobilize is 80 mana for 10ticks; instill is 60 mana for 15 ticks. oh, and i think instill casts faster too.

not really and upgrade id say
▲ Page top
RE: Completely Useless for a Necromancer
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2004 at 3:50 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756066154
View User Forum
43 posts
Hi.

This isn't the complete details, so perhaps someone else could post them. There are supposedly 2 lines of root (not including druids').

1st line will hold the critter imobile for a longer time, and it's great for dots which do *not* have an initial dd component.

2nd line lasts shorter, but it stands up to DD spells much better, and has a lesser chance of breaking when DD is cast.

- Auree
▲ Page top
